generic_agentx_pattern: Grammar-constrained command expansion from shorthand to full command syntax
allowed_scope: Structured command grammar validation with keyword-to-command mapping
forbidden_scope: Claiming general natural language understanding; live production command execution

generic_agentx_pattern: Multi-class single-label classification with finite target set
allowed_scope: Classification benchmarks with bounded, known target sets and evaluation metrics
forbidden_scope: Claiming production NRCS/CAM/MIC/CLIP system access; claiming general intelligence from field prediction

generic_agentx_pattern: Generic configurable evaluation harness with multi-metric support
allowed_scope: Configurable evaluation harness for benchmark prediction quality assessment
forbidden_scope: Claiming production-level system evaluation; claiming real-time monitoring capability

benchcore_specific_concept: Feedback loop (explicit/implicit signals, position bias, drift)
generic_agentx_pattern: Governed feedback benchmark pattern with signal schema, drift detection, and policy enforcement
allowed_scope: Governed feedback signal processing with explicit/implicit classification and drift monitoring
forbidden_scope: Claiming real-time feedback integration; claiming autonomous learning from feedback

benchcore_specific_concept: Dynamic ID label mapping (natural language to dynamic IDs)
generic_agentx_pattern: Capability-to-template retrieval registry with query matching
allowed_scope: Structured retrieval registry for mapping natural language queries to template identifiers
forbidden_scope: Claiming real-time dynamic ID resolution against live production systems

allowed_scope: Learning policy that keeps LLM frozen and updates only retrieval or classifier components
forbidden_scope: Claiming LLM fine-tuning safety; claiming protection against all retraining failure modes

benchcore_specific_concept: Abductive inference vs explanation/deduction in LLMs
generic_agentx_pattern: Inverse-science reasoning-type rules distinguishing abduction, deduction, and explanation
allowed_scope: Reasoning-type classification rules for observations and hypotheses in benchmark context
forbidden_scope: Claiming general reasoning capability in Agent_X; claiming alignment or safety guarantees

generic_agentx_pattern: Structured command grammar validation with format constraints
allowed_scope: Grammar validation for structured commands with defined format, fields, and constraints
forbidden_scope: Claiming broadcast production system capability; claiming support for arbitrary command formats

generic_agentx_pattern: Domain-specific language command validation with prefix-based command grammar
allowed_scope: DSL validation for prefix-based command languages with defined syntax rules
forbidden_scope: Claiming OverDrive system access; claiming general DSL interpretation capability

generic_agentx_pattern: Structured data preprocessing and quality assessment pipeline
allowed_scope: Data quality assessment with valid/invalid fixtures, schema validation, and transformation rules
forbidden_scope: Claiming production data pipeline capability; claiming client data access

benchcore_specific_concept: DB log + MOS log evidence fusion
generic_agentx_pattern: Multi-source evidence fusion with join-key requirement and conflict resolution
allowed_scope: Evidence fusion from multiple structured sources using defined join keys and resolution rules
forbidden_scope: Claiming production log system access; claiming real-time log monitoring capability

generic_agentx_pattern: Generic protocol adapter boundary planning with mock contracts and failure modes
allowed_scope: Protocol adapter planning with mock contracts, request/response schemas, and failure mode documentation
forbidden_scope: Claiming live MOS or REST system integration; claiming production adapter deployment

generic_agentx_pattern: Human-in-loop review pattern with structured suggestion, review action schema, and feedback recording
allowed_scope: Review card schema with accept/reject/modify actions and feedback recording structure
forbidden_scope: Claiming interactive UI capability; claiming live human review deployment

generic_agentx_pattern: Structured code generation benchmark with AST schema and source-code pair validation
allowed_scope: AST generation benchmark with validated source-code pairs and grammar-constrained output
forbidden_scope: Claiming general code generation capability; claiming production code safety

generic_agentx_pattern: Multi-line sequence prediction benchmark with structured field dependencies
allowed_scope: Sequence prediction benchmarks with defined field relationships and multi-line context
forbidden_scope: Claiming production rundown system access; claiming general sequence understanding
